learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Discovery conversations
learn.summary: Listen first. Understand needs before you recommend solutions.
bullets: Discovery questions that uncover goals and concerns
learn.callout: Trust is the bridge between prospecting and presenting solutions.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Discovery role-play
workshop.summary: Practice discovery interviews with coach observation.
bullets: Capture notes on goals, risks, and priorities

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Discovery log
assignment.summary: Record real or practice discovery conversations.
bullets: Log at least one discovery conversation
Note client goals and open questions
Identify what you still need to learn

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What did listening teach you?
reflection.summary: Connect discovery to your persona and value proposition.
prompts: What did you hear that you did not expect?
How will this change your recommendation?
What question will you ask next time?
